author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Sing! Dance! Altaria! | POKÉTOON Short
Swablu loves to sing more than anything, but when it leaves the forest for the city, it can’t seem to find an audience. That changes when it meets Kamina, a girl who also loves singing and has been searching for a partner...
How will the two of them showcase their great musical bond on the big stage? 🎵

#pokemon #altaria #pokemonanime

Pokémon TCG: Mega Evolution—Delta Reign & Pokémon TCG Pocket: Ruler of the Skies | Coming Soon
A powerful Pokémon has been spotted! Look out for Rayquaza’s descent from the sky! 🐉  

 Enjoy a sneak peek of Rayquaza in Pokémon TCG Pocket: Ruler of the Skies, coming next month, and the Pokémon TCG: Mega Evolution—Delta Reign expansion, coming  November 6!
